attacking_style: Opportunistic attacker who exploits tactical stalemates among marked favorites, prefers launching on penultimate climbs rather than waiting for traditional finale locations.
team_tactics: Insufficient data from single race observation to establish team tactical patterns.
terrain_preference: Penultimate climbs where favorites are still marking each other; capable of holding substantial gaps (30+ seconds) through subsequent climbs to finish.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify repeated weakness patterns across multiple races.
key_patterns: Insufficient observations: Only 1 race analyzed, cannot establish patterns requiring 2+ instances
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated tactical awareness and physical strength to convert recognition of favorable race situation into Monument victory
